messages.content:
customer:"Hi! I was wondering when my order will be ready for pick up. Thank you!"

csr reply:"Thank you for contacting 
 
It appears the store team is still working on your order. However, as soon as it is ready, you will receive an email notification with the confirmation that your order is Ready for Pick Up.
 
Pick Up orders are normally ready within 6 hours of being placed!  If it passes that timeframe, please feel free to call the store directly, or reply here.
 
If you have any questions, please let me know. "

customer:"Yeah it's been about a day and a half. I'll contact the store. Thank you"

however upon checking the order it has been cancelled due to inventory error below is my macro for it please enhance it but simple and concise way:
"I am so sorry to inform you that your most recent pick-up order R972235026 was canceled!  This was due to an inventory error that our store team was not aware of until they attempted to fulfill your order.   



We have not charged your payment method due to the cancellation.  Any charge(s) that you see should be pending and will clear within 2-5 business days.

I apologize we could not fulfill your order! "

Certainly! Here's an enhanced, yet straightforward response:

"Hello,

I apologize for the inconvenience, but I must inform you that your order R972235026 for in-store pickup has unfortunately been canceled due to an unforeseen inventory discrepancy. Our team discovered this issue while preparing your order, and as a result, we were unable to proceed as planned.

Please rest assured that no charges have been processed on your payment method. If you see any pending transactions, these should be reversed within 2-5 business days.

We deeply regret that we could not complete your order and are sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused you.

Thank you for understanding, and if there's anything else I can assist you with, please don't hesitate to ask."

<new customer context>
customer:"Have not received order #R919029871
Extremely delayed. When can I expect it?"

upon checking in on our system it states that the order has been delivered please confirm this with us? <provide tracking link>

Certainly, Here's a customer service response addressing the issue with the inclusion of a tracking link for confirmation:

"Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to us regarding your order R919029871. According to our records, your order has been marked as delivered.

To verify this, please follow the tracking link: [Insert Tracking Link Here]. This link should provide you with detailed information on the delivery status.

If the tracking information confirms delivery but you have not received your order, please check with neighbors, your building's reception or management office (if applicable), and any other secure area where the package could have been placed. Sometimes carriers mark packages as delivered slightly in advance.

Should there still be an issue after checking these possibilities, please let us know so we can further assist you in resolving this matter.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your patience.

Best regards."
i mean tell customer to please verify/confirm to us that the order has been delivered correctly to your location as per the tracking link shows

Certainly! Here's a concise response asking for confirmation from the customer regarding the delivery:

"Hello,

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to reach out regarding your order #R919029871. Our system indicates that the order has been delivered.

Could you please confirm that you have received it? You can check the delivery details through this tracking link: [Insert Tracking Link Here].

Your confirmation is important to ensure that your order has arrived correctly and to assist further if there are any issues.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards."
too concise but don't make it too long either

Understood, here’s a revised, moderately detailed response:

"Hello,

Thank you for contacting us about your order #R919029871. I understand that you're concerned about the delay.

Our system shows that the order has been delivered. To ensure that this information is accurate and that your items have arrived safely, could you please confirm receipt? You can check the delivery status and details by following this tracking link: [Insert Tracking Link Here].

If there are any discrepancies or if you need further assistance, please let us know so we can help resolve the issue promptly.

We appreciate your cooperation and look forward to your confirmation.

Warm regards."

<new customer>
customer:"Good morning, I’m just unable to track my package and I’m hoping that it will be in before Christmas. Is there anyway someone can check on that for me please"
however Order placed 12/16 after our christmas delivery cutoff date so it won't be able to arrive before christmas. and the status of the order is in process
this is our in process status macro:"Our fulfillment center has received your order R412195891 and is working on getting it completed!   As soon as it ships, you will receive a shipment notification email with tracking information so that you may keep track of the delivery :)

In the meantime, you can use this link to view your order confirmation: https://www.fivebelow.com/order/status
You will enter your order number & BILLING zip code
Be sure you are entering the FULL billing zip code that was entered at checkout (otherwise the order may appear invalid!)


Please let me know if there is anything else I can assist you with today!"

Understood, here’s a response that informs the customer of the order status while addressing the delivery date concern:

"Good morning,

Thank you for reaching out to us. I understand how important it is to receive your package in time for the holidays.

I've checked the status of your order R412195891, and I see that it's currently being processed by our fulfillment center. Regrettably, as the order was placed on 12/16, it was after our cutoff date for guaranteed Christmas delivery, so we cannot ensure it will arrive before Christmas. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

You will receive an email with tracking information as soon as your order ships out. In the meantime, you can view your order status using this link: https://www.fivebelow.com/order/status. Please ensure you enter your full billing zip code exactly as you provided during checkout to access the information.

If you have any further questions or if there’s anything else I can do to assist you, please don’t hesitate to let me know.

Best wishes for the holiday season."

<new customer>
customer:"I placed an order for four items. 3 are due to be picked up at one location and the 4th item is due to be picked up at a different location due to availability. I have received confirmation about one part of my order but not the one to be picked up at the different store. It’s a 30 minute drive and I don’t want to make it for no reason. I see two different numbers on my order. They are H36161266475 and R079218484. Can I please get an update on them. Thank you"

upon checking the other pick up in store item that was assigned on different store was cancelled due to inventory error.
our macro for that:"I am so sorry that your most recent pick-up order R079218484 was canceled!  This was due to an inventory error that our store team was not aware of until they attempted to fulfill your order.   

We have not charged your payment method due to the cancellation.  Any charge(s) that you see should be pending and will clear within 2-5 business days.

I apologize we could not fulfill your order! "

Hello,

Thank you for contacting us about your recent orders. I've checked both of the order numbers you provided, and I would like to give you an update on their status.

Regarding the three items with order number H36161266475, it seems that you've already received confirmation for their pickup. These should be ready for you at the agreed upon location as arranged.

However, I regret to inform you that the fourth item with order number R079218484 has encountered an issue. Unfortunately, this item was canceled due to an inventory error at the different store location. We sincerely apologize for not being able to fulfill this part of your order and for any inconvenience this has caused, especially considering the distance you'd need to travel.

Please be assured that you have not been charged for the canceled item. If you see any pending transactions for this on your payment method, they will be removed within 2-5 business days.

I understand this is not the update you were hoping for, and I am genuinely sorry for any disruption to your plans. If there's anything more we can do to assist you or if you have any further questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,

<new customer>

customer:"I have not received any updates regarding my order and it has been almost a week! These are "Santa" items and are urgent. When will my items be shipped? Checking my order online has been absolutely NO HELP!!"

however Order placed Dec 14th after our Christmas delivery guarantee date
and also upon checking the status is IN PACKING. 

here's our macro for that:"
Our fulfillment center has received your order R254218705 and is working on getting it completed!   As soon as it ships, you will receive a shipment notification email with tracking information so that you may keep track of the delivery :)

In the meantime, you can use this link to view your order confirmation: https://www.fivebelow.com/order/status
You will enter your order number & BILLING zip code
Be sure you are entering the FULL billing zip code that was entered at checkout (otherwise the order may appear invalid!)


Please let me know if there is anything else I can assist you with today!"

Hello,

Thank you for reaching out about your order R254218705. I completely understand the urgency of your items intended for Santa's delivery and I apologize for any stress caused by the delay in updates.

I have checked the status of your order and can confirm that it is currently in the process of being packed. This means it is one step closer to being on its way to you. We are working diligently to have it shipped out as soon as possible.

While I understand this may be concerning, especially as we draw closer to the holidays, I must inform you that orders placed after December 14th fall outside of our Christmas delivery guarantee. Nonetheless, we are committed to expediting this process to the best of our ability.

You will receive a shipping confirmation email with all the tracking details as soon as the items are dispatched. You can also stay updated by checking your order status at https://www.fivebelow.com/order/status. Remember to use the complete billing zip code you provided during checkout for accurate information.

I truly apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience during this busy season. If there's any more assistance I can offer or if you have other questions, please let me know.

Warm regards.

customer replied:"If there was a notice online advising me that orders after the 12th fall out of Christmas delivery guarantee, I would’ve never purchased. So now I will just wait patiently and see what happens I guess. Thanks for the help"

Hello,

I appreciate your understanding, and I sincerely apologize if the information about the Christmas delivery guarantee cutoff was not clearly conveyed during your purchasing process. We always aim to provide our customers with timely updates to manage expectations, especially around the holiday season.

I understand the importance of your order arriving on time and regret any inconvenience this situation may have caused. Rest assured, we are doing everything we can to expedite your order through the packing and shipping process.

If you need any more information as you wait, or if there’s anything else I might assist you with, please feel free to reach out.

Thank you for your patience, and I hope that your items bring joy when they do arrive.

Warm regards.

<new customer>

simple csr response to : thank you so much!z  happy holidays!
You're very welcome! Happy Holidays to you as well! If you need any more assistance, feel free to get in touch. Take care!

<new customer>
customer called about how to do tax exempt in our organization.

we have an email macro for that which is a little bit lengthy:"
Thanks for writing in. Below is the info that you need to set up a tax-exempt account or shop with tax-exempt status in a Five Below store.

To obtain tax-exempt status with Five Below, State law requires all organizations and/or taxpayers to provide the documentation described below:

501(c) Tax-Exempt Organizations: Valid state-specific or official certificate indicating;
Name of the organization;
Federal/State ID number;
The organization is exempt under 501(c);
Signature when required by state law.


Taxpayers Making a Purchase for Resale: Fully Completed State-specific sales tax exemption certificate. This includes, but not limited to;
Name of the purchaser;
State-specific ID number;
Indicate the purchase is for resale;
Taxpayer signature.


Note: Copies of all documentation will be retained by Five Below to be kept on file.


For Online Purchases:
Please create an account on our site following the link: https://www.fivebelow.com/signup
Once an account is set up, contact us at <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> with your email address, name on the account, and your tax-exempt ID document (as explained above).
Note:  Please do not place an order until you have verification from Customer Relations that your account has been set up with tax-exempt status.  Tax reimbursements for orders placed before an account is set up as tax-exempt must be submitted by the account holder to the state in which the order was placed.



For in-store purchases, either:
1) Provide a copy of the tax exemption paperwork that the store can keep, or,
2) Provide an original (which the store will need a copy and send it to our Home Office)
Please note: stores do not keep your organization's exemption on file, so you will need to bring your exemption each time!

Thanks!
"
although the customer's query is for call. should I reiterate all of this  to the customer? can you provide me a summary for it and maybe i can ask for thecustomer's email so that i can send this for more details.

Absolutely, providing a summary over the phone and offering to send the full details via email can be both efficient and helpful for the customer. Here's a condensed version you can relay on the call:

"Thank you for inquiring about tax-exempt purchases with Five Below. To set up a tax-exempt account or to shop tax-exempt in-store, you'll need to provide specific documentation, such as a valid certificate indicating your organization's name, tax ID number, and details confirming your 501(c) status or information for resale.

For online purchases, you should first create an account on our website and then email us your tax-exempt documentation so we can update your account accordingly. Do not place an order until you have received confirmation from us.

For in-store shopping, simply bring a copy of your tax exemption paperwork each time, as our stores do not keep this information on file.

May I have your email address? I will send you the detailed instructions and documentation required so you can have everything you need to proceed with your tax-exempt status at Five Below."
thanks! what about: i woud love to send you a detailed instructions ... etc. if you would provide me your email address.

That sounds great and very customer-friendly! You could phrase it like this:

"I would love to send you detailed instructions on how to set everything up for tax-exempt purchases with our organization. If you provide me with your email address, I'll ensure that all the necessary information is sent directly to you so you can proceed with ease. What is the best email to reach you at?"

"Thank you for writing in.

I am so sorry, but at this time, we ship only within the contiguous United States (we do not ship to: Alaska, Hawaii, US Virgin Islands, Canada or Puerto Rico).

If you have any other questions, please let me know!"

make this empathetic and friendlier but not too long

"Hello,

Thank you for reaching out.

I truly wish we could assist, but currently, we're only able to ship within the contiguous United States and unfortunately cannot fulfill orders to Alaska, Hawaii, US Virgin Islands, Canada, or Puerto Rico. I understand this may be disappointing, and I'm genuinely sorry for any inconvenience.

Should you have any further queries or require assistance with anything else, please don't hesitate to ask. I'm here to help in any way I can!

Warm regards."

this was customer's concern:"I live in Brazil and would like to make the purchase through the five Below website, however I am unable to complete the purchase as there is no delivery option in Brazil. How can I do it?"

"Hello,

Thank you for your interest in shopping with Five Below. I'm sorry to hear you're encountering difficulties trying to make a purchase from Brazil.

As of now, our shipping capabilities are limited to the contiguous United States, and we're not able to directly ship orders to Brazil or other international destinations. I understand how frustrating this must be and I apologize for any inconvenience caused.

For future purchases, you might consider using a freight forwarding service that provides a U.S. address for your online shopping and then forwards your items to Brazil. However, please be aware that additional fees and international shipping regulations will apply.

I appreciate your understanding, and if you have any more questions or if there's anything else I can assist you with, please let me know.

Best wishes."

<new customer context>
customer:"What would be deeply appreciated is if a company had the integrity to not say a package has been shipped until said package had been scanned as being in transit. 
 
We all know a label being created is not the same as it actually being in the hands of FedEx (or whatever delivery system) and could be days/week before it actually makes it to their transit station. That is the day customers want to know, not the day a label was created.
 
I’m not panicked for this to arrive “in time”. This is for a New Year’s party, not Christmas so two weeks from Arizona gives it plenty of time.
 
Thank you for your time and consideration!"

what would be the best response to this? i checked the tracking link and it is indeed label created recently (1 day ago i think).

this is our shipping timeframe macro:"When you place an order with us, most packages arrive within 5 to 7 business days, not including weekends and holidays.  It is possible, however, that it could take up to 10 business days (depending on carrier delays, inclement weather, etc).  



Whenever you do place an order, you'll get an order confirmation email and a shipping confirmation email so you can keep tabs on your order. The package will ship out with one of our shipping carriers (Fed Ex, USPS, UPS, Pitney Bowes).



If you have additional questions, I would be happy to help!"

"Hello,

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with us. Your feedback is valuable, and we strive to be as transparent as possible about our shipping process.

I understand the distinction between a label being created and a package being scanned into the carrier's system. I agree that it's important to know when the package is physically on its way to you, and I apologize for any confusion that our current notification system may have caused.

I have checked the status of your package and can confirm that as of now, a shipping label has been created, which generally means it's being prepared for dispatch. The actual pickup by the carrier and subsequent scan into their transit system should happen shortly. Considering your timeline for a New Year's party, there should indeed be plenty of time for your order to arrive.

Our standard delivery timeframe is 5 to 7 business days, though it can extend up to 10 business days during busy periods or due to factors such as carrier delays or adverse weather. Rest assured, we will be monitoring the progress of your shipment to help ensure it arrives well before your event.

Should you have any other concerns or need further assistance, feel free to reach out to me. I’m here to help.

Thank you again for your understanding and patience.

Best regards."

"I would love to send you detailed instructions on how to set everything up for tax-exempt purchases with our organization. If you provide me with your email address, I’ll ensure that all the necessary information is sent directly to you so you can proceed with ease."

however when i call backed someone picked up the phone not the first one who left the voicemail. please add that they can refer to the email at their convience or something like that

"Hello,

I had previously received a request regarding setting up tax-exempt purchases with our organization. I have prepared detailed instructions that will guide you through the process.

If you could provide me with an email address, I would be more than happy to send this information over. It will be a convenient reference for you to review and complete the setup at your convenience, ensuring everything is in order for your future tax-exempt purchases.

Should anyone else need to refer to these instructions, they will be readily available in the email to assist with the process.

Thank you for your attention, and please let me know the best email to send these details to.

Best regards."

"I checked our system and can absolutely confirm that you were only charged for the items you picked up: TOTAL HERE

[[IMAGE OF ITEMS PICKED UP/CHARGED FOR HERE]]


The other items that they did not have in stock were removed from your order and you were not charged for them:

[[IMAGE OF SHORTED ITEMS HERE]]" 

pleas change this to something like i checked our system and can confirm that you will only be charged for the items that are available and the other items that they did not have in s tock will be removed from your order and you will not be charge for them. remove the image holders, since yuo will replacing it with this.

Absolutely, here’s how you can rephrase the message without the image placeholders:

"I've reviewed our system and can confirm that you will only be charged for the items that were available and successfully picked up. Any items that were not in stock have been removed from your order, and rest assured, you will not be charged for them.

If you have any further questions or if there’s anything more I can assist you with, please let me know."

so basicalliy customer said :"Half of my order is not available. Why have the items online, if they aren't available?"

and this is my rpely:" am so sorry that your most recent pick-up order R959868031 was short items!   It looks like this was due to an inventory error that we were not aware of until the store attempted to fulfill your order.    

I’ve reviewed our system and can confirm that you will only be charged for the items that were available and successfully picked up. Any items that were not in stock have been removed from your order, and rest assured, you will not be charged for them.

If you are seeing a pending charge for the original amount, it will fall off in the next few days!

I apologize we could not fulfill your whole order.  Please let us know of any additional questions."

please add this concisely and make the whole email not too lon.
"Thank you for reaching back. We understand how frustrating it can be to discover that the item you need is unavailable. Please be assured that we are doing our best to address this issue as efficiently as possible.
 
However, during the holiday season, we often experience an increase in demand for our products. As a result, some items may sell out more quickly than usual. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused you, and we appreciate your understanding.
 
We strive to maintain a well-stocked inventory, and we are constantly seeking ways to improve our availability. We value your loyalty, and we want to make sure that you have access to the products you need when you need them."

"Hello,

I'm truly sorry to hear that not all items in your pick-up order R959868031 were available. This was due to an inventory oversight, and we only became aware of the discrepancy when our store team began preparing your order.

Rest assured, you’ll only be charged for the items that were available and that you've picked up. The unavailable items have been omitted from your order, and no charges will be made for them. Any pending pre-authorization for the original amount should resolve itself within the next few days.

We understand the disappointment and frustration that comes with finding out an item is out of stock, especially during the busy holiday season, which can deplete our inventory faster than usual. We are actively working on improving our stock levels to better meet our customers' needs and prevent similar situations in the future.

Please accept our apologies for any inconvenience, and if you have more questions or there’s anything else you need, do reach out.

Thank you for your understanding and patience.

Best regards."
